post.subject: I feel trapped
post.body: As much as i was loving it here, i have been feeling very trapped here in the last couple of weeks. Of course having no money has not helped at all. Its like being stuck at school. I cant run anywhere. I cant do anything. Cant go home, cant drink, cant go to the cinema... cant do very much. Things have just gone completely wrong. I was talkin to my parents on the phone last night. It didnt go well at all. I bought a pkt of cigarettes afterwards. I do however realise having done that that i dont want to smoke anymore at all and that I can do it. I had my last cigarette this morning and made a conscious decision that it will be my last. I really didnt enjoy that pkt very much. Two days without smoking has done me a lot of good, and so will the next many days to come. I just gotta find stuff to do in its place. work went ok without takin a smoke break. I got home, watched Blow with directors commentary then learned about chemical reactions on BBC Bitesize. Then read, and stared into space for a while... at 6am I got up and watched GMTV and listened to the Chilis. I went to sleep at 8:30am and got up at 3:30pm. With much pursuation I have a little more money. I might treat myself to the cinema tonight...
